name: GBT Regression
description: Gradient-Boosted Tree Regression builds an ensemble of decision trees to predict continuous numerical values by minimizing a specified loss function.
input: This takes in a DataFrame and performs Logistic Regression
output: It generates the GBTRegression and passes it to the next Predict and ModelSave Nodes. The input DataFrame is also passed along to the next nodes.

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing numerical and categorical features used for training the regression model.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column representing the continuous numeric value that the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Name of the output column where predicted numeric values are written after model scoring.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls how the dataset is divided between training and validation for performance evaluation.

fields.name: impurity
fields.title: Impurity
fields.description: Defines how variance reduction is measured when creating tree splits.

fields.name: lossType
fields.title: Loss Function
fields.description: Specifies the loss function minimized during boosting to improve prediction accuracy.

fields.name: maxBins
fields.title: Max Bins
fields.description: Maximum number of bins used to discretize continuous feature values for split evaluation.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Limits the depth of each decision tree to control model complexity.

fields.name: maxIter
fields.title: Max Iterations
fields.description: Number of boosting iterations, corresponding to the number of trees built sequentially.

fields.name: minInfoGain
fields.title: Min Information Gain
fields.description: Minimum variance reduction required for a split to be accepted.

fields.name: minInstancesPerNode
fields.title: Min Instances Per Node
fields.description: Minimum number of records required in each leaf node to ensure stable predictions.

fields.name: subsamplingRate
fields.title: Subsampling Rate
fields.description: Fraction of training data used for each tree to improve generalization.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed value used to control randomness and ensure reproducible training results.

fields.name: stepSize
fields.title: Step Size
fields.description: Learning rate that controls the contribution of each tree to the final prediction.

fields.name: cacheNodeIds
fields.title: Cache Node Ids
fields.description: Caches intermediate tree nodes to improve performance for deep models.

fields.name: checkpointInterval
fields.title: Checkpoint Interval
fields.description: Controls how often intermediate results are checkpointed to manage memory usage.

fields.name: maxMemoryInMB
fields.title: Max memory
fields.description: Maximum memory allocated for histogram-based computations during training.

fields.name: validationIndicatorCol
fields.title: Validation Indicator Column
fields.description: Column indicating whether a row is used for training or validation.

fields.name: featureSubsetStrategy
fields.title: Feature Subset Strategy
fields.description: Determines how many features are considered when selecting splits at each tree node.

fields.name: minWeightFractionPerNode
fields.title: Min Weight Fraction per Node
fields.description: Ensures each split retains a minimum fraction of weighted data.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Optional column defining the relative importance of records during training.

fields.name: minInfoGainGrid
fields.title: Min Info Gain Grid Search
fields.description: Candidate minimum information gain values evaluated during hyperparameter tuning.

fields.name: maxBinsGrid
fields.title: Max Bins Grid Search
fields.description: Range of max bins values tested during grid search.

fields.name: maxDepthGrid
fields.title: Max Depth Grid Search
fields.description: Tree depth values evaluated to balance accuracy and overfitting.

fields.name: maxIterGrid
fields.title: Max Iterations Grid Search
fields.description: Different iteration counts evaluated during hyperparameter tuning.
